title: Zapier Integration

posts.author: leonel.sanchez (Leonel)
posts.cookedHtml: I have an issue with the monday zappier app, I want to use trigger in specific ‘column value changed in board’ and it’s not returning all examples that I need in order to use the changed values, I have an example when I change an status column, but I don’t get the examples for date and text columns, Do u know how monday is returning the json when date and text column changes?
